debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
as bs cs : List α
⊢ @appendLists α (@appendLists α as bs) cs = @appendLists α as (@appendLists α bs cs)

proof:
induction as with
  | nil => simp
  | cons a as ih => simp [ih]
